name_en: 5BB117: Miu Miu New Briefcase, featuring this year's popular new velvet leather, hot all over the internet, canvas lining. This bag is cool, capturing a refined multifunctional design that blends men's and women's elements. Casual and lazy, natural and free-spirited, full of personality. Super large capacity and lightweight. Simple yet not simple. Fashion bloggers almost all have one. Size: 34X23X12cm (with original packaging)
